title: Geodrum
description: Geodrum is Scary! Geodrum is Nightmare!
body:
#Geodrum Dimension Mod by Gardon

Geodrum is a new, rather dark dimension consisting of moderate vegetation, characteristic trees and plants, and powerful fortresses, as well as many hostile and strong mobs that can be terrifying to fight!

#Geodrum Dimension Mod Portal

We build it from the new block "Geodrum Portal Block" and launch "Geodrum Golden Ring"!

#Geodrum Dimension Mod About

We begin our journey by thoroughly familiarizing ourselves with the terrain. At first glance, we notice many enemies that we must defeat to later receive better items! We continue to improve ourselves with new resources in order to later find structures in which we face bosses and find a lot of treasures that will surely make many of you happy!

#Geodrum Dimension Mod Ending

Finally, I will say that the mod requires "GeckoLib" to work and sometimes there may be minor lags when using too many effects at once! Additionally, when fighting bosses, we have to be sure that we are properly prepared for it!
